svg.title: 向低地址增长的线程栈示意图
svg.desc: A stack diagram showing the stack pointer starting near high addresses and growing downward toward a stack sentinel at low addresses.

text.font-family: Noto Sans CJK SC, Source Han Sans SC, Microsoft YaHei, PingFang SC, Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif
